name: corthography-press-client
description: Corthography Press partner client — slash commands for query / render / publish workflows. Wraps the @corthos/corthography-cli binary.

interface.shortDescription: Query, render, and publish Corthography Press workflows from your agent
interface.longDescription: Slash commands wrapping the @corthos/corthography-cli binary so partner agents can stage data (query), render Markdown (render), and publish to destination buckets (publish), plus status, logs, and approval gates.
defaultPrompt: Render the latest Corthography Press template for my project.
What's the status of the press run I just kicked off?
